response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack developer with over a decade of experience, strongly aligning with the required TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack. His explicit experience with AI-agent infrastructure, robust cloud and containerization knowledge (AWS, Kubernetes), and exceptional software testing background make him an outstanding candidate for this senior role.
strengths: Extensive experience with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud/container deployments (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker).
Direct and recent experience with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP (Model Context Protocol), and agentic workflows.
Exceptional background in software craftsmanship, TDD, and testing, including teaching courses and building custom test runners.
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly listed on the resume, requiring a brief ramp-up period.
Several of his recent roles lasted between 1 to 2 years, which might warrant questions regarding long-term retention.
Currently on a career gap for caregiving, which might require a brief adjustment period when returning to a fast-paced environment.
